shakshi: The player entered the witching hour conspiracy — Alfir leads, Kore and Forest assist
The Forest Witch formally met in conspiratorial context — the folded Mercurie map and knowledge of Castle Azoth's passages now in play
The witches and player inside Nexiott's house — his own territory the site of his undoing
The player took point and set the runes — Chaos magic made them the architect of the trap
Alfir, Kore, and Forest set the runes while the player provided cover — the work was theirs, the safety was the player's to maintain
The trap is set — Nexiott's house transformed into a weapon pointed at him, regardless of who led the runing
Castle Azoth is now a runic deathtrap — the architecture of Nexiott's power turned against him
The killing is planned and the method is ready — Nexiott dies in his own house by his own territory
Not just Nexiott but the structure he represents — the broader conspiracy is named
Alfir is taking back what was taken from him — his community, his appointment, his people's safety. The player witnesses this but may not name it.
